title: Better Trial Chambers
description: This datapack improves the Trial Chambers.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/X1VN_qrOu0w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



This datapack aims to improve the already awesome structure that that is the Trial Chambers!

Curseforge page is [Here]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/too-many-trims](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/better-trial-chambers)~~~~)

The Curseforge page has a separate version of the datapack with just the new structures, not new loot or enchantments.



NOTE: There is a separate version of this datapack with no new loot tables or enchantments available.

![Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1016/248/better-trial-chambers.png)

The Trial Chambers gets new rooms, loot, and mobs!

There are new Enchantments too!

New Enchantments:

Breeze Blast:

 -This Sword/Axe enchantment is similar to Wind Burst and is good for aerial combos.

 -Found in Ominous Vaults



Dash:

 -This Sword enchantment is similar to Lunge, but it will activate after every attack.

 -Found in Ominous Vaults



Explosive Impact:

 -This Mace enchantment will allow the wielder to create an explosion when falling from 20 or more blocks. If the player falls more than 50 blocks before hitting a target, then the explosion will be much larger.

 -Found in Boss Room Ominous Vaults



Gustbolt:

 -This Bow enchantment will make arrows shot from the bow into a stronger Wind Charge. Any mob hit with these arrows gets sent flying!

 -Found in Ominous Vaults



Heavy Cleaving:

 -This Axe enchantment will make your axe stronger but the axe will become slower.

 -Found in Ominous Vaults



Heavy Slam:

 -This souped up version of Density can be put on a Mace. It will make the Mace deal more damage, but the holder will fall up to three times as fast while wielding the item.

 -Found in Ominous Vaults



Knockback Protection:

 -This enchantment make the wearer take less knockback. One piece of armor with Knockback Protection IV protects the wearer from all knockback.

 -Found in Vaults and Ominous Vaults



Largeness:

 -This enchantment makes the wielder larger and adds more damage.

 -Found in Vaults and some types of rarer Ominous Vaults



Lightweight:

 -This enchantment makes your Mace lighter and gives it faster attack speed.

 -Found in Ominous Vaults



Reach:

 -This powerful enchantment makes your weapon have a larger attack range. it is very expensive to apply and is rare.

 -Found in Vaults and Ominous Vaults



Smash Protection:

 -This enchantment will protect the wearer from Mace Smash hits.

 -Found in Vaults and Ominous Vaults



Step Height:

 -This rare enchantment will give the wearer more step height.

 -Found in Vaults and Ominous Vaults



Trial's Bane:

 -This enchantment deals more damage to most mobs that commonly spawn in Trial Chambers.

 -Found in Vaults and Ominous Vaults



Trial Speed:

 -This enchantment is similar to Soul Speed, but it will make the wearer run faster on blocks often found in the Trial Chambers.

 -Found in Ominous Vaults



Report bugs [Here](https://discord.gg/65Y5pn2TAW)



Go to my [Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuvzUmcTrqXztT7R1oJGQeg) for more updates and info.
